title: Robert Kilmer
compiled_truth: Robert Kilmer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-06 to 2002-05-06), Robert Kilmer sent 21 and received 582 emails, totalling 603 interactions.
